description_long: This cabin features a modern rustic design with a prominent gable roof covered in brown shingles, extending over a wide front porch area. The front facade is dominated by large floor-to-ceiling windows, allowing ample natural light into the main living space, and a single door is centrally located for entry. The exterior walls are clad in dark wood or wood-like panels, contrasted by brick or stone skirting around the base. The side view reveals two large rectangular windows, while the rear is mostly solid with subtle horizontal wood paneling. The structure sits on a raised platform with steps leading up to the porch, and a paved area extends along one side, possibly for outdoor seating or access. The overall appearance is both inviting and robust, suitable for suburban or park-like urban settings.
description: A modern rustic cabin with a gable roof, large front windows, and a wide porch, featuring dark wood siding and brick or stone accents.
description_view_0: The front view shows the wide gable roof, large glass windows, central door, and a spacious porch with steps leading up.
description_view_1: The left side view displays two large rectangular windows and the extended paved area, with the roof sloping down evenly.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a mostly solid wall with horizontal wood paneling and no visible windows or doors.
description_view_3: The top-down view highlights the full expanse of the gable roof and the layout of the porch and paved areas around the cabin.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhangs, covered in brown shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Front facade features three large, vertically oriented rectangular windows in a symmetrical arrangement; left side has two large rectangular windows spaced apart; no windows visible on the rear or right side.
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade, directly accessible from the porch steps.
